LanguageData.MammothTusk.description: A mammoth's tusk. Very durable and valuable. Too unwieldy to be used as a weapon.
LanguageData.ElasmotheriumHorn.description: An elasmotherium's horn. Too unwieldy to be used as a weapon.
LanguageData.SmilodonFangs.description: A dead smilodon's pair of canines.A fantastic trophy.
LanguageData.DeinotheriumTusk.description: A deinotherium's tusk. Very durable and valuable. Too unwieldy to be used as a weapon.
LanguageData.PlatybelodonTusk.description: A platybelodon's tusk. Somewhat small, compared to those of other proboscidea. Very valuable.
